abandoned.en: left alone and no longer used or cared for

ex.en: The abandoned house stood at the end of the street.
ex.ko: 그 버려진 집은 거리 끝에 서 있었다.

abnormally.en: in a way that is not normal

ex.en: The temperature rose abnormally fast this spring.
ex.ko: 올봄 기온이 비정상적으로 빠르게 올랐다.

abolish.en: officially end a law, system, or practice

ex.en: The government abolished the old tax law.
ex.ko: 정부는 오래된 세법을 폐지했다.

aboriginal.cue: 그 지역 원래 살던 사람들과 관련된
aboriginal.en: belonging to the native people who lived in a place from the earliest times

ex.en: The museum displays aboriginal art from Australia.
ex.ko: 그 박물관은 호주 원주민 예술품을 전시한다.

aboriginal.en: a person belonging to the native people of a region

ex.en: Aboriginals have lived in Australia for tens of thousands of years.
ex.ko: 원주민들은 수만 년 동안 호주에 살아왔다.

ex.en: The meeting ended abruptly.
ex.ko: 회의가 갑자기 끝났다.

absentee.en: a person who is not present at an expected place, such as work or school

ex.en: The teacher noted down the absentees.
ex.ko: 선생님은 결석자들을 기록했다.

ex.en: It's absurd to think we can finish this in one day.
ex.ko: 이걸 하루 만에 끝낼 수 있다고 생각하는 건 터무니없다.

abuse.en: cruel or violent treatment of a person or animal

ex.en: The child suffered years of abuse.
ex.ko: 그 아이는 수년간 학대를 겪었다.

abuse.en: the improper or excessive use of something

ex.en: Drug abuse is a serious problem in many countries.
ex.ko: 약물 남용은 많은 나라에서 심각한 문제다.

abuse.en: treat a person or animal with cruelty or violence

ex.en: He was arrested for abusing his pet.
ex.ko: 그는 반려동물을 학대한 혐의로 체포되었다.

abuse.en: use something in a wrong or harmful way

ex.en: She was accused of abusing her power as manager.
ex.ko: 그녀는 매니저로서 권력을 남용했다는 혐의를 받았다.

accessibility.en: the quality of being easy to reach, enter, or use

ex.en: The new building was designed with accessibility in mind.
ex.ko: 그 새 건물은 접근성을 고려해 설계되었다.

accommodation.en: a place to live or stay, especially for travelers

ex.en: The hotel offers comfortable accommodation for families.
ex.ko: 그 호텔은 가족을 위한 편안한 숙박시설을 제공한다.

accommodation.en: an agreement reached by making changes to satisfy different needs

ex.en: The two sides finally reached an accommodation.
ex.ko: 양측은 마침내 합의에 도달했다.

accordingly.en: as a result of what has just been said

ex.en: The weather was terrible, and accordingly, the trip was cancelled.
ex.ko: 날씨가 끔찍해서 그에 따라 여행이 취소되었다.

accordingly.en: in a way that matches the particular situation

ex.en: Please review the rules and act accordingly.
ex.ko: 규칙을 검토하고 그에 맞게 행동하세요.

accumulate.en: gradually increase in amount over time

ex.en: Dust had accumulated on the shelves.
ex.ko: 선반에 먼지가 쌓여 있었다.

accusation.en: a statement saying that someone has done something wrong

ex.en: She denied the accusation of theft.
ex.ko: 그녀는 절도 혐의를 부인했다.

achievable.en: able to be achieved or accomplished

ex.en: Set achievable goals for this semester.
ex.ko: 이번 학기에 달성 가능한 목표를 세워라.

acid.en: a chemical substance that can be sour in taste and reacts with a base to form a salt

ex.en: The scientist mixed the acid carefully.
ex.ko: 그 과학자는 산을 조심스럽게 섞었다.

acid.en: (of remarks or humor) harsh or bitter in tone

ex.en: He made an acid remark about her cooking.
ex.ko: 그는 그녀의 요리에 대해 신랄한 말을 했다.

acquisition.en: the process of learning or gaining a skill or knowledge

ex.en: Language acquisition is easier for young children.
ex.ko: 언어 습득은 어린아이들에게 더 쉽다.

acquisition.en: the act of buying or obtaining a company or property

ex.en: The acquisition of the smaller firm boosted profits.
ex.ko: 그 소규모 회사의 인수는 수익을 늘렸다.

actively.en: in a way that involves energetic participation

ex.en: She is actively involved in the community project.
ex.ko: 그녀는 지역사회 프로젝트에 적극적으로 참여하고 있다.

ex.en: The actual cost was higher than expected.
ex.ko: 실제 비용은 예상보다 높았다.

acute.en: (of a problem or illness) sudden, severe, and serious

ex.en: The hospital treats patients with acute illnesses.
ex.ko: 그 병원은 급성 질환 환자를 치료한다.

acute.en: very sharp or sensitive in perceiving or understanding

ex.en: Dogs have an acute sense of smell.
ex.ko: 개는 예민한 후각을 가지고 있다.

ex.en: An acute angle measures less than ninety degrees.
ex.ko: 예각은 90도보다 작다.

adaptable.en: able to change easily to suit new conditions

ex.en: She is very adaptable and enjoys new challenges.
ex.ko: 그녀는 적응력이 뛰어나서 새로운 도전을 즐긴다.

addict.en: a person who cannot stop using a harmful substance

ex.en: He used to be a drug addict.
ex.ko: 그는 예전에 약물 중독자였다.

addict.en: someone who is extremely devoted to a particular activity (informal)

ex.en: My brother is a total video game addict.
ex.ko: 내 남동생은 완전 게임광이다.

addicted.en: unable to stop doing or using something harmful

ex.en: He became addicted to painkillers.
ex.ko: 그는 진통제에 중독되었다.

addiction.en: a strong need to keep doing or using something harmful

ex.en: She is getting treatment for her addiction.
ex.ko: 그녀는 중독 치료를 받고 있다.

additionally.en: used to add extra information to what has already been said

ex.en: Additionally, the hotel offers free breakfast.
ex.ko: 게다가, 그 호텔은 무료 조식을 제공한다.

adequate.en: enough or satisfactory for a particular purpose

ex.en: We need adequate supplies for the trip.
ex.ko: 우리는 여행을 위한 충분한 물자가 필요하다.

ex.en: The service was adequate, nothing special.
ex.ko: 서비스는 그럭저럭이었고, 특별하지는 않았다.

adequately.en: in a way that is enough or satisfactory

ex.en: Make sure the room is adequately heated.
ex.ko: 방이 충분히 따뜻한지 확인해라.

adjustment.en: a small change made to improve or correct something

ex.en: He made a few adjustments to the schedule.
ex.ko: 그는 일정을 조금 조정했다.

adjustment.en: the process of getting used to a new situation

ex.en: The adjustment to life abroad took a few months.
ex.ko: 해외 생활에 적응하는 데 몇 달이 걸렸다.

administrative.en: relating to the management of an organization or business

ex.en: She handles all the administrative tasks in the office.
ex.ko: 그녀는 사무실의 모든 행정 업무를 처리한다.

ex.en: Her courage was truly admirable.
ex.ko: 그녀의 용기는 정말 존경할 만했다.

admiringly.en: in a way that shows admiration

ex.en: He looked at the painting admiringly.
ex.ko: 그는 감탄하며 그 그림을 바라보았다.

admittedly.en: used to admit that something is true before making another point

ex.en: Admittedly, the plan has some risks.
ex.ko: 인정하건대, 그 계획에는 위험 요소가 좀 있다.

adopted.en: legally taken into a family as one's own child

ex.en: They raised their adopted son with love.
ex.ko: 그들은 입양된 아들을 사랑으로 키웠다.

adoption.en: the act of legally taking a child into your family as your own

ex.en: The couple celebrated the adoption of their daughter.
ex.ko: 그 부부는 딸의 입양을 축하했다.

adoption.en: the act of choosing to start using something new, such as a policy or technology

ex.en: The adoption of new technology increased productivity.
ex.ko: 새 기술의 도입이 생산성을 높였다.

adore.en: love and admire someone or something very much

ex.en: She adores her little nephew.
ex.ko: 그녀는 어린 조카를 매우 좋아한다.

adorn.en: make something more beautiful by adding decoration

ex.en: Flowers adorned the wedding hall.
ex.ko: 꽃들이 결혼식장을 장식했다.

advancement.en: the process of making progress or improving

ex.en: The advancement of technology has changed our lives.
ex.ko: 기술의 발전은 우리 삶을 바꾸었다.

advancement.cue: 직장에서 더 높은 자리로 오르는 것
advancement.en: a move to a higher position in one's job or career

ex.en: He worked hard for career advancement.
ex.ko: 그는 승진을 위해 열심히 일했다.

advent.en: the arrival of something important or new

ex.en: The advent of the internet changed communication forever.
ex.ko: 인터넷의 도래는 의사소통을 영원히 바꾸었다.

advent.en: the period of four weeks before Christmas in the Christian calendar

ex.en: Many families light a candle each week during Advent.
ex.ko: 많은 가정이 대림절 동안 매주 초를 켠다.

adventurous.en: willing to try new, exciting, or risky things

ex.en: She has an adventurous spirit and loves to travel alone.
ex.ko: 그녀는 모험적인 성격이라 혼자 여행하는 걸 좋아한다.

adverse.en: unfavorable or harmful to someone or something

ex.en: The medicine can cause adverse side effects.
ex.ko: 그 약은 부정적인 부작용을 일으킬 수 있다.

adversely.en: in a way that has a harmful or negative effect

ex.en: The drought adversely affected crop yields.
ex.ko: 가뭄은 농작물 수확량에 부정적인 영향을 미쳤다.

ex.en: She showed great strength in the face of adversity.
ex.ko: 그녀는 역경 앞에서 큰 강인함을 보였다.

affectionate.en: showing warm and loving feelings towards someone

ex.en: He gave his daughter an affectionate hug.
ex.ko: 그는 딸을 다정하게 안아주었다.

affectionately.en: in a way that shows warm and loving feelings

ex.en: She spoke affectionately about her grandmother.
ex.ko: 그녀는 할머니에 대해 다정하게 이야기했다.

affordable.cue: 가격이 부담 없이 살 수 있는
affordable.en: not expensive; that you can afford to pay for

ex.en: They found an affordable apartment near downtown.
ex.ko: 그들은 시내 근처에서 저렴한 아파트를 구했다.

ageless.en: never seeming to grow old or go out of style

ex.en: Her ageless beauty amazed everyone at the reunion.
ex.ko: 그녀의 나이를 초월한 아름다움은 동창회에서 모두를 놀라게 했다.

aggressively.en: in a forceful or hostile way

ex.en: He argued aggressively for his position.
ex.ko: 그는 자기 입장을 공격적으로 주장했다.

agonize.en: suffer great anxiety while trying to make a difficult decision

ex.en: She agonized over whether to accept the job offer.
ex.ko: 그녀는 그 일자리 제안을 받아들일지 괴로워하며 고민했다.

agony.en: very great physical or mental pain

ex.en: He screamed in agony after the injury.
ex.ko: 그는 부상을 당한 후 극심한 고통에 비명을 질렀다.

aircraft.en: a vehicle that can fly, such as an airplane or helicopter

ex.en: The aircraft landed safely despite the storm.
ex.ko: 그 항공기는 폭풍에도 안전하게 착륙했다.

aircrew.en: the people who work on an aircraft, including pilots and flight attendants

ex.en: The aircrew welcomed passengers as they boarded.
ex.ko: 항공 승무원들이 탑승하는 승객들을 맞이했다.

alcoholism.en: a serious medical condition of being unable to stop drinking alcohol

ex.en: He sought help to overcome his alcoholism.
ex.ko: 그는 알코올 중독을 극복하기 위해 도움을 구했다.

alert.en: paying close attention and watching for possible danger

ex.en: The guard stayed alert throughout the night.
ex.ko: 경비원은 밤새 경계 태세를 유지했다.

alert.en: warn someone about a possible danger or problem

ex.en: The siren alerted residents to the storm.
ex.ko: 사이렌이 주민들에게 폭풍을 알렸다.

alert.en: a warning signal about a possible danger

ex.en: They issued a flood alert for the area.
ex.ko: 그들은 그 지역에 홍수 경보를 발령했다.

allegation.en: a claim that someone has done something wrong, without proof yet

ex.en: He denied the allegations against him.
ex.ko: 그는 자신에 대한 혐의를 부인했다.

alliance.en: a formal agreement between countries or groups to work together

ex.en: The two countries formed a military alliance.
ex.ko: 그 두 나라는 군사 동맹을 맺었다.

ally.en: a country or person that cooperates with and supports another

ex.en: The two nations have been close allies for decades.
ex.ko: 그 두 나라는 수십 년간 가까운 동맹국이었다.

ally.en: join with another country or group for a shared purpose

ex.en: The small nation allied itself with a stronger power.
ex.ko: 그 작은 나라는 더 강한 나라와 동맹을 맺었다.

ex.en: The boat pulled up alongside the dock.
ex.ko: 배가 부두 옆에 나란히 정박했다.

alphabetical.en: arranged in the order of the letters of the alphabet

ex.en: The names are listed in alphabetical order.
ex.ko: 이름들은 알파벳순으로 나열되어 있다.

altar.en: a table used for religious ceremonies, especially in a church

ex.en: The couple exchanged vows at the altar.
ex.ko: 그 부부는 제단에서 서약을 교환했다.

alter.en: make something different, usually in a small way

ex.en: She altered her plans due to the weather.
ex.ko: 그녀는 날씨 때문에 계획을 변경했다.

alternate.en: happening every other one in a series

ex.en: I go to the gym on alternate days.
ex.ko: 나는 격일로 헬스장에 간다.

alternate.cue: 다른 것 대신 쓸 수 있는
alternate.en: available as another possibility instead of the usual one

ex.en: We took an alternate route to avoid traffic.
ex.ko: 우리는 교통 체증을 피하려고 대체 경로를 이용했다.

alternate.en: do or use two things by turns, one after the other

ex.en: The two teams alternate between attack and defense.
ex.ko: 두 팀은 공격과 수비를 번갈아 한다.

alternatively.en: used to introduce another possibility or choice

ex.en: You can pay online, or alternatively, visit our office.
ex.ko: 온라인으로 결제하거나, 그렇지 않으면 저희 사무실을 방문하셔도 됩니다.

altitude.en: the height of something above sea level or the ground

ex.en: The plane is flying at an altitude of 30,000 feet.
ex.ko: 그 비행기는 고도 3만 피트에서 비행하고 있다.

aluminum.en: a lightweight silver-colored metal used to make cans, foil, and other products

ex.en: The cans are made of recycled aluminum.
ex.ko: 그 캔들은 재활용 알루미늄으로 만들어졌다.

amaze.en: cause someone to feel great surprise or wonder

ex.en: Her talent amazed the judges.
ex.ko: 그녀의 재능은 심사위원들을 놀라게 했다.

amazement.en: a feeling of great surprise or wonder

ex.en: He stared in amazement at the magic trick.
ex.ko: 그는 그 마술을 보고 놀라움에 빠져 바라보았다.

amazingly.en: in a way that causes great surprise

ex.en: Amazingly, no one was hurt in the accident.
ex.ko: 놀랍게도, 그 사고에서 다친 사람이 아무도 없었다.

ambassador.en: a senior official who represents their country in a foreign country

ex.en: She was appointed as the ambassador to France.
ex.ko: 그녀는 프랑스 주재 대사로 임명되었다.

ambassador.en: a person chosen to represent and promote an organization or brand

ex.en: The singer became a goodwill ambassador for the charity.
ex.ko: 그 가수는 그 자선단체의 홍보대사가 되었다.

ambiguity.en: the quality of having more than one possible meaning, causing confusion

ex.en: The contract's ambiguity led to a dispute.
ex.ko: 그 계약서의 모호성이 분쟁으로 이어졌다.

ambiguous.cue: 뜻이 여러 가지로 해석될 수 있는
ambiguous.en: having more than one possible meaning, unclear

ex.en: His answer was ambiguous and left us confused.
ex.ko: 그의 대답은 모호해서 우리를 혼란스럽게 했다.

ammonia.en: a strong-smelling gas or liquid used in cleaning products and chemicals

ex.en: The smell of ammonia filled the lab.
ex.ko: 실험실에 암모니아 냄새가 가득했다.

amongst.en: in the middle of or included in a group (a formal form of 'among')

ex.en: She felt at home amongst her old friends.
ex.ko: 그녀는 오랜 친구들 사이에서 편안함을 느꼈다.

ample.en: more than enough in amount or size

ex.en: We have ample time to finish the project.
ex.ko: 우리는 그 프로젝트를 끝낼 충분한 시간이 있다.

amplifier.en: a device that makes electrical signals, especially sound, stronger

ex.en: He connected his guitar to the amplifier.
ex.ko: 그는 기타를 앰프에 연결했다.

amplify.en: make a sound, feeling, or effect stronger or greater

ex.en: The microphone amplified her voice across the hall.
ex.ko: 마이크가 그녀의 목소리를 홀 전체에 증폭시켰다.

amuse.en: make someone feel entertained or make them laugh

ex.en: The clown amused the children with funny tricks.
ex.ko: 그 광대는 재미있는 묘기로 아이들을 즐겁게 했다.

analogy.en: a comparison between two things to explain or clarify an idea

ex.en: The teacher used an analogy to explain how the heart works.
ex.ko: 선생님은 비유를 들어 심장이 어떻게 작동하는지 설명했다.

analyst.en: a person who examines information in detail, especially in business or finance

ex.en: The financial analyst predicted a rise in stock prices.
ex.ko: 그 금융 분석가는 주가 상승을 예측했다.

anchor.en: a heavy metal object used to keep a boat in place in the water

ex.en: The sailors dropped the anchor near the shore.
ex.ko: 선원들은 해안 근처에 닻을 내렸다.

ex.en: The bookshelf was anchored to the wall for safety.
ex.ko: 안전을 위해 책장이 벽에 고정되었다.

anchor.en: a television reporter who presents and coordinates a news broadcast

ex.en: He has been the news anchor for ten years.
ex.ko: 그는 10년 동안 뉴스 앵커였다.

anchorage.en: a place where boats or ships can anchor safely

ex.en: The fishing boats found shelter in the anchorage.
ex.ko: 어선들은 정박지에서 피난처를 찾았다.

anchorman.en: a man who presents a television news program

ex.en: The anchorman read the breaking news calmly.
ex.ko: 그 남자 앵커는 속보를 침착하게 읽었다.

anchorperson.en: a person, of either gender, who presents a television news program

ex.en: The anchorperson introduced the next story.
ex.ko: 그 앵커는 다음 소식을 소개했다.

ex.en: She felt deep anguish after losing her job.
ex.ko: 그녀는 직장을 잃은 후 깊은 고뇌를 느꼈다.

animate.en: give the appearance of movement or life to something, such as a drawing

ex.en: The studio animated the characters using computer software.
ex.ko: 그 스튜디오는 컴퓨터 소프트웨어로 캐릭터들에 생동감을 주었다.

anonymous.en: with a name that is not known or made public

ex.en: The donation was made by an anonymous donor.
ex.ko: 그 기부는 익명의 기부자에 의해 이루어졌다.

antiaircraft.en: designed to defend against attack from aircraft

ex.en: The base was equipped with antiaircraft missiles.
ex.ko: 그 기지는 대공 미사일을 갖추고 있었다.

antibacterial.en: able to kill bacteria or stop them from growing

ex.en: She used antibacterial soap to wash her hands.
ex.ko: 그녀는 항균 비누로 손을 씻었다.

anticancer.en: used to treat or fight cancer

ex.en: Scientists discovered a new anticancer drug.
ex.ko: 과학자들은 새로운 항암제를 발견했다.

anticipate.en: expect something to happen and prepare for it, or look forward to it

ex.en: We anticipate a large crowd at the concert.
ex.ko: 우리는 그 콘서트에 많은 관중이 올 것으로 예상한다.

anticipation.en: the feeling of looking forward to something that is expected to happen

ex.en: The children waited with anticipation for the fireworks.
ex.ko: 아이들은 기대감을 안고 불꽃놀이를 기다렸다.

antipollution.en: intended to reduce or prevent pollution

ex.en: The city passed new antipollution laws.
ex.ko: 그 도시는 새로운 오염 방지법을 통과시켰다.

antistatic.en: designed to prevent the buildup of static electricity

ex.en: He wrapped the circuit board in an antistatic bag.
ex.ko: 그는 회로 기판을 정전기 방지 봉투에 포장했다.

antivirus.en: designed to detect and remove computer viruses

ex.en: Make sure your antivirus software is up to date.
ex.ko: 백신 프로그램이 최신 상태인지 확인하세요.

apostrophe.en: the punctuation mark (') used to show missing letters or possession

ex.en: Don't forget the apostrophe in "it's".
ex.ko: 'it's'에 아포스트로피 넣는 걸 잊지 마세요.

applicant.en: a person who formally applies for a job, place, or something else

ex.en: There were fifty applicants for the position.
ex.ko: 그 자리에 지원자가 50명 있었다.

appreciative.en: feeling or showing thanks for something

ex.en: She was appreciative of all the support she received.
ex.ko: 그녀는 받은 모든 도움에 감사했다.

appropriately.en: in a way that is suitable for a particular situation

ex.en: Please dress appropriately for the interview.
ex.ko: 면접에 적절하게 옷을 입으세요.

approximate.en: close to the exact number or amount, but not exact

ex.en: Give me an approximate time when you'll arrive.
ex.ko: 도착할 대략적인 시간을 알려줘.

approximate.en: estimate a quantity or value roughly

ex.en: He approximated the cost of the repairs.
ex.ko: 그는 수리 비용을 대략 추정했다.

arch.en: a curved structure that forms the top of an opening, such as a doorway or bridge

ex.en: They walked under the stone arch.
ex.ko: 그들은 그 돌 아치 아래를 걸어갔다.

arch.en: form or cause something to form a curved shape

ex.en: The cat arched its back when it saw the dog.
ex.ko: 고양이는 개를 보자 등을 활 모양으로 구부렸다.

archaeologist.en: a scientist who studies ancient history through the objects and remains people left behind

ex.en: The archaeologist discovered ancient pottery at the site.
ex.ko: 그 고고학자는 그 유적지에서 고대 도자기를 발견했다.

arctic.en: relating to the region around the North Pole

ex.en: Polar bears live in the Arctic region.
ex.ko: 북극곰은 북극 지역에 산다.

arctic.en: extremely cold, like the weather in the Arctic

ex.en: We faced arctic conditions during the winter hike.
ex.ko: 우리는 겨울 등산 중에 혹한의 상황을 마주했다.

arena.en: a large building used for sports or entertainment events

ex.en: The concert was held in a huge arena.
ex.ko: 그 콘서트는 대형 경기장에서 열렸다.

arena.en: a particular area of activity, such as politics or business

ex.en: She became a leading figure in the political arena.
ex.ko: 그녀는 정치 무대에서 주요 인물이 되었다.

aristocracy.en: the highest social class, often made up of people with inherited titles

ex.en: The aristocracy once controlled most of the land.
ex.ko: 귀족 계급은 한때 대부분의 땅을 소유했다.

armful.cue: 두 팔로 안을 수 있는 양
armful.en: the amount of something that can be carried in your arms

ex.en: She carried an armful of firewood into the house.
ex.ko: 그녀는 장작 한 아름을 집 안으로 들고 왔다.

arouse.en: cause a feeling or reaction to start

ex.en: The news aroused public concern.
ex.ko: 그 뉴스는 대중의 우려를 불러일으켰다.

arrogant.en: having an exaggerated sense of one's own importance

ex.en: His arrogant attitude annoyed his coworkers.
ex.ko: 그의 오만한 태도는 동료들을 짜증나게 했다.

artery.cue: 심장에서 나온 피를 몸으로 보내는 혈관
artery.en: a blood vessel that carries blood from the heart to the rest of the body

ex.en: The doctor checked for blockages in his artery.
ex.ko: 의사는 그의 동맥에 막힘이 있는지 확인했다.

artery.en: a major road or route that carries a lot of traffic

ex.en: The highway is the main artery connecting the two cities.
ex.ko: 그 고속도로는 두 도시를 잇는 주요 간선도로다.

articulate.en: able to express ideas clearly and effectively in words

ex.en: She is an articulate speaker who explains complex ideas simply.
ex.ko: 그녀는 복잡한 개념을 간단히 설명하는 조리 있는 화자다.

articulate.en: express an idea or feeling clearly in words

ex.en: He struggled to articulate his feelings about the loss.
ex.ko: 그는 상실에 대한 감정을 분명히 표현하는 데 어려움을 겪었다.

artificially.en: in a way that is not natural, but made or caused by people

ex.en: The fruit was artificially ripened.
ex.ko: 그 과일은 인위적으로 숙성되었다.

artistry.en: great skill in creating or performing something artistic

ex.en: The dancer's artistry amazed the audience.
ex.ko: 그 무용수의 기교는 관객을 놀라게 했다.

ash.en: the gray powder left after something has burned

ex.en: He brushed the ash off the table.
ex.ko: 그는 탁자 위의 재를 털어냈다.

ash.en: a type of tree with strong wood, often used for furniture

ex.en: The table was made of solid ash wood.
ex.ko: 그 탁자는 단단한 물푸레나무로 만들어졌다.

aspiration.en: a strong desire to achieve something great in the future

ex.en: Her aspiration is to become a doctor.
ex.ko: 그녀의 포부는 의사가 되는 것이다.

aspire.en: have a strong desire to achieve or become something

ex.en: He aspires to become a professional musician.
ex.ko: 그는 전문 음악가가 되기를 열망한다.

assault.en: a violent physical attack on someone

ex.en: He was charged with assault after the fight.
ex.ko: 그는 그 싸움 이후 폭행 혐의로 기소되었다.

ex.en: The man was arrested for assaulting a police officer.
ex.ko: 그 남자는 경찰관을 폭행한 혐의로 체포되었다.

assemble.en: put together the parts of something, such as furniture

ex.en: It took an hour to assemble the bookshelf.
ex.ko: 책장을 조립하는 데 한 시간이 걸렸다.

assemble.en: come together, or bring people together, in one place

ex.en: Students assembled in the auditorium for the ceremony.
ex.ko: 학생들은 그 행사를 위해 강당에 모였다.

assembly.en: a meeting of a large group of people for a particular purpose

ex.en: All students gathered for the morning assembly.
ex.ko: 모든 학생이 아침 조회를 위해 모였다.

assembly.en: the process of putting together the parts of something

ex.en: The assembly of the car takes place on the factory line.
ex.ko: 그 자동차의 조립은 공장 라인에서 이루어진다.

assert.en: state something firmly and confidently as true

ex.en: She asserted that the report was accurate.
ex.ko: 그녀는 그 보고서가 정확하다고 단언했다.

assert.en: behave in a confident way and express your opinions or rights clearly

ex.en: He learned to assert himself in meetings.
ex.ko: 그는 회의에서 자기 자신을 내세우는 법을 배웠다.

assess.en: judge or estimate the quality, value, or extent of something

ex.en: The teacher assessed the students' progress.
ex.ko: 선생님은 학생들의 발전 정도를 평가했다.

assessment.en: a judgment about the value, quality, or extent of something

ex.en: The report includes a risk assessment.
ex.ko: 그 보고서에는 위험 평가가 포함되어 있다.

assumption.en: something you believe to be true without proof

ex.en: Don't make assumptions about people you don't know.
ex.ko: 잘 모르는 사람에 대해 함부로 추정하지 마라.

assurance.en: a feeling of confidence about oneself or a situation

ex.en: She spoke with great assurance during the interview.
ex.ko: 그녀는 면접에서 대단한 확신을 갖고 말했다.

assurance.en: a promise that something is true or will definitely happen

ex.en: He gave us an assurance that the work would be finished on time.
ex.ko: 그는 그 작업이 제때 끝날 것이라고 우리에게 확언했다.

assure.en: tell someone something confidently to remove their doubts or worries

ex.en: He assured me that everything would be fine.
ex.ko: 그는 나에게 모든 게 괜찮을 거라고 장담했다.

ex.en: The magician's trick astonished the audience.
ex.ko: 그 마술사의 묘기는 관객을 깜짝 놀라게 했다.

ex.en: I was astonished to see her at the party.
ex.ko: 나는 파티에서 그녀를 보고 깜짝 놀랐다.

ex.en: She made astonishing progress in just a month.
ex.ko: 그녀는 한 달 만에 놀랄 만한 발전을 이루었다.

ex.en: To everyone's astonishment, the team won the final match.
ex.ko: 모두가 놀랍게도, 그 팀이 결승전에서 이겼다.

astronomy.en: the scientific study of stars, planets, and space

ex.en: She is majoring in astronomy at university.
ex.ko: 그녀는 대학에서 천문학을 전공하고 있다.

athletics.en: sports involving running, jumping, and throwing, or sports in general

ex.en: He represented his country in athletics at the Olympics.
ex.ko: 그는 올림픽 육상경기에서 자국을 대표했다.

attached.en: having strong feelings of affection or connection to someone or something

ex.en: She is very attached to her childhood home.
ex.ko: 그녀는 어린 시절 집에 대한 애착이 크다.

attached.en: joined to or included with a document or email

ex.en: Please find the attached file for details.
ex.ko: 자세한 내용은 첨부된 파일을 확인하세요.

attainable.en: able to be reached or achieved

ex.en: The coach set attainable goals for the team.
ex.ko: 코치는 팀을 위해 달성 가능한 목표를 세웠다.

attainment.en: the act of successfully achieving something

ex.en: The attainment of independence took years of struggle.
ex.ko: 독립의 달성에는 수년간의 투쟁이 필요했다.

attendance.en: the act of being present at an event or place

ex.en: Attendance is required for all students.
ex.ko: 모든 학생에게 출석이 요구된다.

attendance.en: the number of people who are present at an event

ex.en: Attendance at the concert was higher than expected.
ex.ko: 그 콘서트의 참석자 수는 예상보다 많았다.

attentive.en: paying close attention to someone or something, or noticing their needs

ex.en: The waiter was very attentive to our needs.
ex.ko: 그 웨이터는 우리의 필요에 매우 주의를 기울였다.

attentively.en: in a way that shows careful attention

ex.en: She listened attentively to the lecture.
ex.ko: 그녀는 강의를 주의 깊게 들었다.

attractiveness.en: the quality of being pleasing or appealing

ex.en: The city's attractiveness draws many tourists.
ex.ko: 그 도시의 매력은 많은 관광객을 끌어들인다.

attribute.en: a quality or characteristic that something or someone has

ex.en: Honesty is an important attribute for a leader.
ex.ko: 정직함은 리더에게 중요한 속성이다.

attribute.en: say that something is the result of a particular cause

ex.en: She attributed her success to hard work and luck.
ex.ko: 그녀는 자신의 성공을 노력과 운 덕분으로 돌렸다.

atypical.en: not typical of a particular type, group, or class

ex.en: His reaction was atypical for someone so calm.
ex.ko: 그렇게 침착한 사람치고는 그의 반응이 이례적이었다.

aubergine.en: a purple vegetable, also called eggplant in American English

ex.en: She grilled some aubergine for dinner.
ex.ko: 그녀는 저녁으로 가지를 구웠다.

audit.en: an official examination of financial records to check they are correct

ex.en: The company underwent an annual audit.
ex.ko: 그 회사는 연례 회계감사를 받았다.

audit.en: attend a class without getting official credit for it

ex.en: He audited a philosophy course out of interest.
ex.ko: 그는 흥미로 철학 수업을 청강했다.

audition.en: a short performance to test if someone is suitable for a role

ex.en: She got the part after a great audition.
ex.ko: 그녀는 훌륭한 오디션 끝에 배역을 따냈다.

audition.en: perform in a short test to be considered for a role

ex.en: Hundreds of dancers auditioned for the show.
ex.ko: 수백 명의 무용수들이 그 쇼에 오디션을 봤다.

authoritative.en: having authority, expertise, and confidence that makes people trust it

ex.en: He spoke in an authoritative tone.
ex.ko: 그는 권위 있는 어조로 말했다.

authorize.en: give official permission for something to happen

ex.en: The manager authorized the payment.
ex.ko: 그 매니저는 그 지불을 승인했다.

availability.cue: 필요할 때 이용할 수 있는 상태
availability.en: the state of being able to be used or obtained

ex.en: Please check the availability of the room before booking.
ex.ko: 예약 전에 그 방의 이용 가능 여부를 확인하세요.

ex.en: We await your reply.
ex.ko: 우리는 당신의 답변을 기다린다.

awe.en: a feeling of great respect and wonder, sometimes mixed with fear

ex.en: The tourists stood in awe of the ancient temple.
ex.ko: 관광객들은 그 고대 사원 앞에서 경외감에 서 있었다.

awe.en: fill someone with a feeling of great respect and wonder

ex.en: The vast canyon awed every visitor.
ex.ko: 그 거대한 협곡은 모든 방문객에게 경외감을 갖게 했다.

ax.en: a tool with a sharp blade used for cutting wood

ex.en: He chopped the log with an ax.
ex.ko: 그는 도끼로 그 통나무를 팼다.

ax.en: suddenly end a job, project, or plan

ex.en: The company axed hundreds of jobs last year.
ex.ko: 그 회사는 작년에 수백 개의 일자리를 없앴다.

axis.en: an imaginary line around which something rotates

ex.en: The Earth rotates on its axis once a day.
ex.ko: 지구는 하루에 한 번 자전축을 중심으로 자전한다.

axis.en: the alliance of Germany, Italy, and Japan during World War II

ex.en: The history class studied the rise of the Axis powers.
ex.ko: 그 역사 수업은 추축국의 부상을 다뤘다.

backup.en: a copy of computer data saved in case the original is lost

ex.en: Always keep a backup of your important files.
ex.ko: 항상 중요한 파일은 백업을 해두어라.

backup.en: available to be used if the main one fails or is needed

ex.en: We have a backup generator in case of a power outage.
ex.ko: 정전에 대비해 예비 발전기가 있다.

backward.en: toward the back or in the reverse direction

ex.en: He took a step backward in surprise.
ex.ko: 그는 놀라서 뒤로 한 걸음 물러섰다.

backward.en: not having developed as much as other places or systems

ex.en: The region's infrastructure remains backward compared to the capital.
ex.ko: 그 지역의 기반시설은 수도에 비해 여전히 낙후되어 있다.

backyard.en: an area of land behind a house

ex.en: The kids played soccer in the backyard.
ex.ko: 아이들은 뒷마당에서 축구를 했다.

bad-tempered.cue: 화를 잘 내고 짜증을 잘 내는

ex.en: He gets bad-tempered when he's hungry.
ex.ko: 그는 배가 고프면 성질을 잘 낸다.
